subcodes.first_line: O My Name, the Mahdi! Thy letter which thou didst send unto My servant who was present before My throne hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی المهدی قد حضر کتابک الذی ارسلته الی عبدی الذی کان حاضرا عند عرشی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @firmness in the Covenant
